title: [AIG] Paths are missing due to duplication
body:
```mlir
hw.module private @foo(in %a : i1, in %b: i1, out x : i1) {
  %0 = aig.and_inv %a, %a, %b : i1
  hw.output %0 : i1
}
```

```
$ circt-opt foo.mlir  --pass-pipeline='builtin.module(aig-print-longest-path-analysis{show-top-k-percent=100})
# Longest Path Analysis result for "foo"
Found 1 paths
Found 1 unique fanout points
Maximum path delay: 2
## Showing Levels
Level = 2         . Count = 1         . 100.00    %
## Top 1 (out of 1) fan-out points

==============================================
#1: Distance=2
FanOut=Object($root.x[0])
FanIn=Object($root.a[0])
== History Start (closer to fanout) ==
<--- (logic delay 2) ---
Object($root.a[0], delay=0, comment="input port")
== History End (closer to fanin) ==
```

A path between `x` and `b` is missed due to a bug in path duplication.
code_blocks:
